runs.summary: Memory index updated — 6 new AI-Tech/Finance source pages, Finance folder reorg, email-to-clipping task, Meta rollup (3 missed thinker runs)
content: Scheduled Maintenance: fixed stale wiki-memory-update time (was 9:47 PM, now 11:45 PM); added email-to-clipping (daily 1:06 PM — checks botfred47@gmail.com for unread mail, saves as .md clippings, labels processed in Gmail; created 2026-07-12)

Key Decisions: added Finance root reorg (2026-07-12) — 24 flat root files split into finance/technical-analysis-snapshots/ (11 TA write-ups) and finance/morningstar/ (12 source-morningstar-* + watchlist); ~40 wikilinks rewritten vault-wide

Domain Content Status — AI & Tech: added 3 new source pages (Micron US chipmaking, Arora token pricing, Information AM digest) plus HBM/constraint-model updates (GlobalWafers wafer oligopoly node, Micron Q3 earnings, SK Hynix IPO, CoreWeave bull counterpoint) and a Meta Compute capacity-figure update, all not yet in wiki/index.md

Domain Content Status — Finance: added 3 new source pages (Morningstar cheap stocks, 10 best companies, InvestWithAI data sources), OTIS/AZZ/PENG paper trades (P1 28 open +6.07%, P2 9 open −5.50%), trading portfolio KLR trim, and the 8-subfolder reorg note

Domain Content Status — Meta: run count corrected from 4 to 7 (had missed 2026-07-09, -10, -11 wiki-thinker runs still sitting unprocessed in log.md); rolled in newest connections (Sports Betting/Kelly Criterion; Workday deploy-time claim vs AI adoption survey data)

Open Threads: refreshed paper-trading and trading-portfolio snapshots to 2026-07-10 figures; expanded the 'pages not yet in wiki/index.md' thread from 2 to 8 pages; added 2 new AI-Tech threads (Meta capacity reconciliation gap, Workday/AI-adoption contradiction); trimmed two stale month-old health-check paragraphs (2026-06-07, 2026-06-13) to short pointers since superseded by current Domain Content Status data

Note: log.md has an ordering quirk — most new entries append at the bottom in true chronological order, but a block of entries also gets prepended at the top; had to grep the whole file for date patterns to confirm no entries were missed (found and incorporated a reorg entry and a thinker run that were sitting past the last memory-update marker in the bottom block)
Appended memory-update log line to log.md for 2026-07-12

runs.summary: Memory index updated — portfolio-management skill + scheduled task, Morning Briefing tab, trading portfolio configured, IQV trim recorded
content: Active Skills: added /portfolio-management (morning portfolio review — live prices, TA signals per position, portfolio shape, trade ideas; leverages technical-analyst and equity-analyst skills)

Scheduled Maintenance: added portfolio-management-briefing (Mon–Fri 3AM CEST — writes morning briefing to fred-dashboard data file, commits/pushes to GitHub). Note on SKILL.md overwrite risk documented.

Key Decisions: added 3 new entries — (1) scheduler SKILL.md overwrite nuance (full instructions kept in SKILL.md, never call update_scheduled_task); (2) trading portfolio mirrors wiki and must be kept in sync; (3) Morning Briefing tab parsing format (ALL-CAPS section headers)

Open Threads (Finance/Paper Trading): updated to 2026-07-08 figures (P1: 26 open, +5.68%; P2: 7 open, −5.93%) and added trading portfolio live state (7 positions, €3,517 cash, IQV trimmed 3 shares @$208, net realised +€86.79 YTD)
Appended memory-update log line to log.md for 2026-07-09
